title: Introduction to Conflict Studies from an IR perspective
further_info: Recommended Reading Baylis, J., Smith, S., Owens, P. (Eds.) (2023). The globalization of world politics, 9. Edition. Oxford: Oxford University Press. Bellamy, A., Williams, P., and Griffin, S. (2010). Understanding peacekeeping. 2nd ed. Cambridge, U.K. ; Malden, MA, U.S.A.: Polity Press. Davies, S., Pettersson, T., & Öberg, M. (2023). Organized violence 1989–2022, and the return of conflict between states. Journal of Peace Research, 60(4), 691-708. https://doi.org/10.1177/00223433231185169 Galtung, J. (1969). Violence, Peace, and Peace Research. Journal of Peace Research, 6(3), 167–191. http://www.jstor.org/stable/422690 Rioux, J., Neufeld Redekop, V. (2013). Introduction to Conflict Studies: Empirical, Theoretical and Ethical Dimensions. Oxford: Oxford University Press. Strachan, H., Scheipers S. (Eds.) (2011). The Changing Character of War. Oxford Academic. Wallensteen, P. (2003). Understanding Conflict Resolution. War, Peace and the Global System. SAGE Publications.
